action: Treat data/full_book_figure_list_i0229.tsv as the temporary canonical figure ID ledger until the final selected matrix changes.
reason: Stable IDs reduce caption, source-note, and cross-reference drift.

action: When an exhibit is inserted, removed, or moved across chapters, update the figure list and record the selection-matrix change in the same pass.
reason: Figure numbers depend on selected order, not manifest order.

action: Use figure_id and chapter_anchor together in manuscript references; never cite only the asset ID in reader-facing prose.
reason: Asset IDs are production handles, while figure IDs are book-facing.

action: Do not mark selected_pending_capture, selected_pending_rights_review, or selected_pending_source_surface_review rows as publication-ready until their capture, rights, and source-note gates pass.
Keep alt text concise and claim-safe; revise any generated alt text during final layout when the exact crop or page context changes.
reason: Alt text should explain the figure without adding unsupported claims.

action: Preserve source_ids from the source-note QA ledger and resolve blanks before final render.
reason: Every final figure needs source/provenance continuity.

action: Use caption_gate and provenance_gate fields as render-smoke test inputs for I-0230.
reason: The next render pass needs a deterministic list of what to inspect.

action: Freeze figure numbering only after the rights-risk triage and page-flow mock decide replacements.
reason: The current list is stable for production, not final against all future replacements.
